svg.title: Network and protocol — two interconnected layers
svg.desc: Two side-by-side panels. Left: the network, off-chain marketplace activities and operators. Right: the protocol, on-chain functions and registered identities on Arbitrum One. Five labeled events cross the boundary between them: stake bonded, active set, tickets redeemed, rewards minted, votes cast. The same three actors (gateways, orchestrators, delegators) appear in both panels.
svg.text: Network and protocol — two layers, one system
